# Duvelisib 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Duvelisib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Duvelisib</strong> 目前有 <strong>12 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Duvelisib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Copiktra monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with:   Relapsed or refractory chronic lymphocytic leukaemia (CLL) after at least two prior therapies.  Follicular lymphoma (FL)...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>Hodgkins lymphoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>myeloid leukemia（99.9%）</li>
<li>follicular lymphoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>acute lymphoblastic/lymphocytic leukemia（99.9%）</li>
<li>chronic myelogenous leukemia, BCR-ABL1 positive（99.9%）</li>
<li>Ewing sarcoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma with immunoglobulin heavy chain variable-region gene somatic hypermutation（99.9%）</li>
<li>pregerminal center chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>mantle cell lymphoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>ganglioneuroblastoma (disease)（99.8%）</li>
<li>B-cell neoplasm（99.8%）</li>
<li>vertebral anomalies and variable endocrine and T-cell dysfunction（99.8%）</li>
<li>retroperitoneal neoplasm（99.8%）</li>
<li>Richter syndrome（99.8%）</li>
<li>neuroblastoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>blast phase chronic myelogenous leukemia, BCR-ABL1 positive（99.7%）</li>
<li>neoplasm of mature B-cells（99.7%）</li>
<li>small intestinal Burkitt lymphoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>lymphoma, non-Hodgkin, familial（99.7%）</li>
<li>thyroid gland mucosa-associated lymphoid tissue lymphoma（99.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/duvelisib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
